chunks.title: Rescue and Resurrection
chunks.reason: A prophetic oracle describing the end times, resurrection, and the sealing of Daniel's vision.

chunks.title: The Question by the River
chunks.reason: A visionary scene where Daniel observes figures by the river and receives a sworn answer regarding the duration of events.

chunks.title: Daniel's Inquiry and Explanation
chunks.reason: A dialogue where Daniel asks for the outcome and receives an explanation about purification and understanding.

chunks.title: Days of Waiting and Final Rest
chunks.reason: Specific time periods are given followed by an exhortation to Daniel to wait and receive his final rest.
